description: Initial screen state: Dark background with white text providing instructions for screen sharing in a Meet call.
frame_description: A dark screen with the text 'Great. To start, please click the "Share" button in the Meet call controls and choose to share this window.' is visible.

description: Task instructions are progressively displayed on the screen, outlining a scenario about planning a holiday from the Sunshine Coast to London.
frame_description: The screen displays a paragraph of text detailing the user's task: imagining they live on the Sunshine Coast and are planning a trip to London.

description: An 'Open' button appears in the center of the screen below the instructions.

description: User clicks the 'Open' button to launch the browser.

description: The browser navigates from the instruction screen to the Google homepage.

description: Google homepage is fully loaded and ready for input.

description: User clicks on the Google search input field.

description: User types 'flights from sunshine coast to london' into the search bar.

description: Autocomplete suggestions dropdown appears below the search bar in response to typing.

description: Browser navigates from the Google homepage to the search results page.
